text.tspan: Please only use the .svg files. .svgz filesa are Inkscape master files that contain
UNFLATTENED references to the Spinnaker font (available on Google Fonts)
Please be cautions of minimum size of compact icon files that contain text. As a
guideline, the Compact Logo icons should be a minimum of 116px width (OR
118px height, but not both) in a browser page.
